seoTitle: How to Sell PDFs on Gumroad: Ebook Selling Guide
metaDescription: Learn how to upload a PDF to Gumroad, build a product listing, price it, and publish so you can start selling ebooks and digital downloads today.
intro: If you have a PDF, ebook, guide, or worksheet you'd like to turn into income, Gumroad handles the selling mechanics so you can focus on the content. This walkthrough covers the full process, from creating a new product to publishing it for customers to buy, so you can get your first digital download listed with confidence.

steps.heading: Create a new product
steps.body: Start from your Gumroad dashboard and create a new product listing, which becomes the container for your PDF and its sales page.

steps.heading: Upload your PDF or ebook file
steps.body: Add the actual file customers will receive after purchase, making sure it's the finished version you want to sell.

steps.heading: Set price and product details
steps.body: Fill in your title, description, and price so shoppers understand exactly what they're buying and why it's worth it.

steps.heading: Publish and promote
steps.body: Once the listing looks right, publish it and share the link with your audience to start generating sales.

faq.question: Can I sell any type of PDF on Gumroad, not just ebooks?
faq.answer: Yes, Gumroad supports guides, worksheets, templates, and other PDF-based digital products, not just full-length ebooks.

faq.question: Do I need a website to sell on Gumroad?
faq.answer: No, Gumroad gives you a hosted product page, so you can share the link directly without a separate website.

faq.question: How do customers receive the file after buying?
faq.answer: After checkout, buyers get instant access to download the PDF directly from their receipt or account.

faq.question: Can I update the PDF after it's published?
faq.answer: Yes, you can replace or update the uploaded file later, and past buyers typically retain access to the current version.
